message: docs: explain why TQ and brute-force results may differ

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,8 @@

TurboQuant Vector Search

Compress embeddings. Search client-side. No server needed.

Dot product computed directly on compressed vectors via WASM — no decompression step.

+

TurboQuant is lossy (~3 bits/dim). Top results match, but borderline results near the ranking cutoff + may swap due to small score differences (~0.02). This is the expected tradeoff: 6x less memory for ~80-100% recall.
